---
listing: 
  contents: 
    - "dl4sg_seminar/*.qmd"
    - "qff_london/*.qmd"
    - "euro_leeds/*.qmd"
    - 'wgsss_25/*.qmd'
    - 'dhis2_webinar/*.qmd'
    - 'lomsac_2026/*.qmd'
    - 'exeter_visit/*.qmd'
    - 'dhis2_demo/*.qmd'
    - 'jsi_session/*.qmd'
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, author, date, categories]
  image-height: "150px"
page-layout: full
format: html
---
